item.title: Euro zone bonds steady, spreads tighten as investors assess impact of Iran war
item.author: EBR European Business Report
item.description:
* US insurance for Gulf shipping in focus
* Traders price around a 30% chance of an ECB rate hike in 2026
* Italian and French yield spreads tighten (Adds comments, background)
By Stefano Rebaudo
March 4 (Reuters) - Euro zone government bonds edged higher on Wednesday as investors paused after a...
